Whenever you cast a white spell, create a 1/1 white Viking creature token.

Whenever you cast a red spell, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

Whenever Runspau or another Human enters under your control, look at the top three cards of your library, reveal a land card from among them, put it into your hand, then put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

Vestri, Queen of Dokkar's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creatures you control.
Whenever Vestri attacks, another target Elf creature you control gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is Vestri's power.

Whenever Kurth, The Allseer becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, that opponent loses the game at the beginning of the next end step.
When Kurth enters the battlefield, if you didn't cast it from your hand, you lose the game.
At the beginning of your end step, search your library for a permanent card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

Whenever Dunvar attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it, then you may return a creature card with mana value less than or equal to Dunvar's power from a graveyard to the battlefield under your control.

cards.rules_text:
Reach, haste
At the beginning of each combat, you may pay {GW}{GW}. If you do, creatures you control gain first strike until end of turn if a creature you control has first strike. The same is true for flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, pillage, trample, and vigilance.

Flying
Whenever this creature enters or transforms into Dagny, Sun's Chariot, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain trample and haste until end of turn.
At the beginning of your end step, you may pay {WB}{WB}. If you do, transform Dagny.
